title: What slideotter does
summary: slideotter keeps intent, content, workflow actions, preview, and validation in one local loop.
note: Authors work in the browser; the server owns writes, rendering, and validation.

cards.title: Capture context
cards.body: Store audience, objective, tone, constraints, and per-slide intent once.

cards.title: Edit and run
cards.body: Edit text in preview, choose candidate counts, ideate slides, and compare options.

cards.title: Validate output
cards.body: Use DOM checks and render gates to catch spacing, text, media, and PDF drift.
